creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
(In reply to Vladislav V. Prodan from comment #2)

I updated sendmail to version 8.15.2 and its behavior has not changed :(

The original message was received at Sat, 4 Jul 2015 18:03:56 +0300 (EEST)
from localhost [IPv6:0:0:0:0:0:0:0:1]

   ----- The following addresses had permanent fatal errors -----
<urist_prodan@mail.ru>
    (reason: 553 5.3.5 system config error)
<universite@ukr.net>
    (reason: 553 5.3.5 system config error)

   ----- Transcript of session follows -----
553 5.3.5 mxs.mail.ru. config error: mail loops back to me (MX problem?)
554 5.3.5 Local configuration error
553 5.3.5 mxs.ukr.net. config error: mail loops back to me (MX problem?)
554 5.3.5 Local configuration error
Reporting-MTA: dns; mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
Received-From-MTA: DNS; localhost
Arrival-Date: Sat, 4 Jul 2015 18:03:56 +0300 (EEST)

Final-Recipient: RFC822; urist_prodan@mail.ru
Action: failed
Status: 5.3.5
Diagnostic-Code: SMTP; 553 5.3.5 system config error
Last-Attempt-Date: Sat, 4 Jul 2015 18:04:03 +0300 (EEST)

Final-Recipient: RFC822; universite@ukr.net
Action: failed
Status: 5.3.5
Diagnostic-Code: SMTP; 553 5.3.5 system config error
Last-Attempt-Date: Sat, 4 Jul 2015 18:04:08 +0300 (EEST)


# echo '$=m' | sendmail -bt -d0.4
Version 8.15.2
 Compiled with: DNSMAP IPV6_FULL LOG MAP_REGEX MATCHGECOS MILTER
                MIME7TO8 MIME8TO7 NAMED_BIND NETINET NETINET6 NETUNIX NEWDB NIS
                PICKY_HELO_CHECK PIPELINING SASLv2 SCANF SOCKETMAP STARTTLS
                TCPWRAPPERS USERDB XDEBUG
Canonical name: mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
 UUCP nodename: mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
        a.k.a.: mary-teresa
        a.k.a.: [IPv6:2001:470:28:140:0:0:0:5]

============ SYSTEM IDENTITY (after readcf) ============
      (short domain name) $w = mary-teresa
  (canonical domain name) $j = mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
         (subdomain name) $m = otrada.od.ua
              (node name) $k = mary-teresa.otrada.od.ua
========================================================

ADDRESS TEST MODE (ruleset 3 NOT automatically invoked)
Enter <ruleset> <address>
> otrada.od.ua
>
